---
title: "AFL Betting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(fitzRoy)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(lubridate)
library(slider)
library(tidyr)
```

## R Markdown

```{r EWMA}
library(purrr)

calc_ewma <- function(x, alpha = 0.7) {
  if (length(x) == 0) return(numeric(0))
  accumulate(x, ~ alpha * .y + (1 - alpha) * .x)
}

```


```{r AFL Data}
##Extract Data spanning the past decade
current_year <- as.numeric(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))
seasons <- 2016:current_year
data_player <- map_dfr(seasons, ~ fetch_player_stats(season = .x))

##Get AFL fixture to help determine opponent team 
fixtures <- fetch_fixture(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS" | status == "SCHEDULED") %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId, home.team.name, away.team.name)


##Extract AFL Lineup data of games that haven't happened
afl_lineups <- fetch_lineup_afl(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS") %>%
  left_join(fixtures, by="providerId") %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         opponent = case_when(
           teamType == 'home' & teamName == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamType == 'away' & teamName == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
         venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId,
                status,
                player.playerId,
                player.playerName.givenName, 
                player.playerName.surname,
                position,
                year,
                round.roundNumber,
                teamName,
                opponent,
                venue
                )


## Create dataframe that will be binded onto player stats goals
# Align afl_lineups columns to match player_stats_goals schema
future_games <- afl_lineups %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName                        = player.playerName.givenName,
    player.surname                          = player.playerName.surname,
    player.player.position                  = position,
    team.name                               = teamName,
    goals                               = NA_real_,
    behinds = NA_real_,
    total_points = NA_real_,
    inside50s  = NA_real_,
    marksInside50             = NA_real_,
    timeOnGroundPercentage                  = NA_real_,
    goalAccuracy    = NA_real_,
    shotsAtGoal    = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.marksOnLead = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.f50GroundBallGets              = NA_real_,
    intercepts    = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs       = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.spoils  = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.contestDefOneOnOnes = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.contestDefLosses = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.interceptMarks = NA_real_,
    contestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    uncontestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets = NA_real_,
    
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    goals,
    behinds,
    inside50s,
    marksInside50,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    goalAccuracy,
    shotsAtGoal,
    extendedStats.marksOnLead,
    extendedStats.f50GroundBallGets,
    intercepts,
    extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs,
    extendedStats.spoils,
    extendedStats.contestDefOneOnOnes,
    extendedStats.contestDefLosses,
    extendedStats.interceptMarks,
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets
  )



##Get the goal stats
player_stats_goals_concluded <- data_player  %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED" | status == "CONFIRMED_TEAMS" ) %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         total_points = (goals*6 + behinds),
         opponent = case_when(
           teamStatus == 'home' & team.name == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamStatus == 'away' & team.name == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
    venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.playerId,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    goals,
    behinds,
    total_points,
    inside50s,
    marksInside50,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    goalAccuracy,
    shotsAtGoal,
    extendedStats.marksOnLead,
    extendedStats.f50GroundBallGets,
    intercepts,
    extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs,
    extendedStats.spoils,
    extendedStats.contestDefOneOnOnes,
    extendedStats.contestDefLosses,
    extendedStats.interceptMarks,
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets
    
  )

# Bind into the main dataframe
player_stats_goals <- bind_rows(player_stats_goals_concluded, future_games)

```

```{r feature_engineering}
##conduct feature engineering on the data that will be trained on

##Use lag function to get prior game goals
player_stats_goals <- player_stats_goals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    goal_lag = lag(goals),
    inside50s_lag = lag(inside50s),
    tog_lag = lag(timeOnGroundPercentage),
    goalAccuracy_lag = lag(goalAccuracy),
    shotsAtGoal_lag = lag(shotsAtGoal),
    marksOnLead_lag = lag(extendedStats.marksOnLead),
    f50GroundBallGets_lag = lag(extendedStats.f50GroundBallGets),
    marksInside50_lag = lag(marksInside50),
    total_points_lag = lag(total_points),
    intercepts_lag = lag(intercepts),
    defHalfPressureActs_lag = lag(extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs),
    spoils_lag = lag(extendedStats.spoils),
    contestDefOneOnOnes_lag = lag(extendedStats.contestDefOneOnOnes),
    contestDefLosses_lag  =  lag(extendedStats.contestDefLosses),
    interceptMarks_lag = lag(extendedStats.interceptMarks)  
    
    
  )

##Calculate averages and use lag to shift prior
player_stats_goals <- player_stats_goals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    ewma_goal_lag    = replace(goal_lag, !is.na(goal_lag), calc_ewma(goal_lag[!is.na(goal_lag)])),
    ewma_inside50s_lag    = replace(inside50s_lag, !is.na(inside50s_lag), calc_ewma(inside50s_lag[!is.na(inside50s_lag)])),
    ewma_GA_lag     = replace(goalAccuracy_lag, !is.na(goalAccuracy_lag), calc_ewma(goalAccuracy_lag[!is.na(goalAccuracy_lag)])),
    ewma_SAG_lag     = replace(shotsAtGoal_lag, !is.na(shotsAtGoal_lag), calc_ewma(shotsAtGoal_lag[!is.na(shotsAtGoal_lag)])),
    ewma_TOG_lag     = replace(tog_lag, !is.na(tog_lag), calc_ewma(tog_lag[!is.na(tog_lag)])),
    ewma_MOL_lag     = replace(marksOnLead_lag, !is.na(marksOnLead_lag), calc_ewma(marksOnLead_lag[!is.na(marksOnLead_lag)])),
    ewma_f50GBG_lag   = replace(f50GroundBallGets_lag, !is.na(f50GroundBallGets_lag), calc_ewma(f50GroundBallGets_lag[!is.na(f50GroundBallGets_lag)])),
    ewma_marksInside50_lag = replace(marksInside50_lag, !is.na(marksInside50_lag), calc_ewma(marksInside50_lag[!is.na(marksInside50_lag)])),
    avg_goal_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(goal_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_goal_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(goal_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_inside50s_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(inside50s_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_SAG_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(shotsAtGoal_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_TOG_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(tog_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_MOL_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(marksOnLead_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_f50GBG_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(f50GroundBallGets_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_marksInside50_5 = lag(slide_dbl(marksInside50_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_goal_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(goal_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_goal_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(goal_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


# ── Opponent defensive profile — goals/attacks CONCEDED (grouped by opponent) ─
# i.e. what does each team give up to the opposition forwards
opponent_defensive_profile_conc <- player_stats_goals %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED") %>%
  group_by(year, round.roundNumber, opponent) %>%
  summarise(
    goals_conceded       = sum(goal_lag,              na.rm = TRUE),
    inside50s_conceded   = sum(inside50s_lag,         na.rm = TRUE),
    shotsAtGoal_conceded = sum(shotsAtGoal_lag,       na.rm = TRUE),
    marksOnLead_conceded = sum(marksOnLead_lag,       na.rm = TRUE),
    marksInside50_conceded = sum(marksInside50_lag,       na.rm = TRUE),
    f50GBG_conceded      = sum(f50GroundBallGets_lag, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_points_conceded = sum(total_points_lag,     na.rm = TRUE),
    # ── Total points per inside 50 — efficiency of attacks against this team ──
    points_per_i50_conceded = total_points_conceded / inside50s_conceded,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Defensive actions PRODUCED — grouped by team name not opponent ────────────
# i.e. what defensive work does each team produce themselves
opponent_defensive_profile_for <- player_stats_goals %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED") %>%
  group_by(year, round.roundNumber, team.name) %>%
  summarise(
    intercepts_for          = sum(intercepts_lag,          na.rm = TRUE),
    defHalfPressureActs_for = sum(defHalfPressureActs_lag, na.rm = TRUE),
    spoils_for              = sum(spoils_lag,              na.rm = TRUE),
    contestDefOneOnOnes_for = sum(contestDefOneOnOnes_lag, na.rm = TRUE),
    contestDefLosses_for    = sum(contestDefLosses_lag,    na.rm = TRUE),
    interceptMarks_for      = sum(interceptMarks_lag,      na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # Rename team.name to opponent so it can be joined to conceded profile
  rename(opponent = team.name)

# ── Join conceded and produced into single profile ────────────────────────────
opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile_conc %>%
  left_join(opponent_defensive_profile_for,
            by = c("year", "round.roundNumber", "opponent"))

# ── Rolling 5 game averages ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  arrange(opponent, year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(opponent) %>%
  mutate(
    avg_goals_conceded          = lag(slide_dbl(goals_conceded,          ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_inside50s_conceded      = lag(slide_dbl(inside50s_conceded,      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_shotsAtGoal_conceded    = lag(slide_dbl(shotsAtGoal_conceded,    ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_marksOnLead_conceded    = lag(slide_dbl(marksOnLead_conceded,    ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_f50GBG_conceded         = lag(slide_dbl(f50GBG_conceded,         ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_marksInside50_conceded        = lag(slide_dbl(marksInside50_conceded,         ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_points_per_i50_conceded = lag(slide_dbl(points_per_i50_conceded, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_intercepts_for          = lag(slide_dbl(intercepts_for,          ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_defHalfPressureActs_for = lag(slide_dbl(defHalfPressureActs_for, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_spoils_for              = lag(slide_dbl(spoils_for,              ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_contestDefOneOnOnes_for = lag(slide_dbl(contestDefOneOnOnes_for, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_contestDefLosses_for    = lag(slide_dbl(contestDefLosses_for,    ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_interceptMarks_for      = lag(slide_dbl(interceptMarks_for,      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── League averages ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
league_avgs <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  filter(!is.na(avg_goals_conceded)) %>%
  summarise(
    league_goals_conceded          = mean(goals_conceded,          na.rm = TRUE),
    league_inside50s_conceded      = mean(inside50s_conceded,      na.rm = TRUE),
    league_shotsAtGoal_conceded    = mean(shotsAtGoal_conceded,    na.rm = TRUE),
    league_marksOnLead_conceded    = mean(marksOnLead_conceded,    na.rm = TRUE),
    league_f50GBG_conceded         = mean(f50GBG_conceded,         na.rm = TRUE),
    league_marksInside50_conceded  = mean(marksInside50_conceded,  na.rm = TRUE),
    league_points_per_i50_conceded = mean(points_per_i50_conceded, na.rm = TRUE),
    league_intercepts_for          = mean(intercepts_for,          na.rm = TRUE),
    league_defHalfPressureActs_for = mean(defHalfPressureActs_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    league_spoils_for              = mean(spoils_for,              na.rm = TRUE),
    league_contestDefOneOnOnes_for = mean(contestDefOneOnOnes_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    league_contestDefLosses_for    = mean(contestDefLosses_for,    na.rm = TRUE),
    league_interceptMarks_for      = mean(interceptMarks_for,      na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# ── Opponent factors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  mutate(
    opp_goals_factor               = avg_goals_conceded          / league_avgs$league_goals_conceded,
    opp_inside50s_factor           = avg_inside50s_conceded      / league_avgs$league_inside50s_conceded,
    opp_shotsAtGoal_factor         = avg_shotsAtGoal_conceded    / league_avgs$league_shotsAtGoal_conceded,
    opp_marksOnLead_factor         = avg_marksOnLead_conceded    / league_avgs$league_marksOnLead_conceded,
    opp_f50GBG_factor              = avg_f50GBG_conceded         / league_avgs$league_f50GBG_conceded,
    opp_marksInside50_factor       = avg_marksInside50_conceded  / league_avgs$league_marksInside50_conceded,
    opp_points_per_i50_factor      = avg_points_per_i50_conceded / league_avgs$league_points_per_i50_conceded,
    opp_intercepts_factor          = avg_intercepts_for          / league_avgs$league_intercepts_for,
    opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor = avg_defHalfPressureActs_for / league_avgs$league_defHalfPressureActs_for,
    opp_spoils_factor              = avg_spoils_for              / league_avgs$league_spoils_for,
    opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor = avg_contestDefOneOnOnes_for / league_avgs$league_contestDefOneOnOnes_for,
    opp_contestDefLosses_factor    = avg_contestDefLosses_for    / league_avgs$league_contestDefLosses_for,
    opp_interceptMarks_factor      = avg_interceptMarks_for      / league_avgs$league_interceptMarks_for
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    year, round.roundNumber, opponent,
    opp_goals_factor,
    opp_inside50s_factor,
    opp_shotsAtGoal_factor,
    opp_marksOnLead_factor,
    opp_f50GBG_factor,
    opp_marksInside50_factor,
    opp_points_per_i50_factor,
    opp_intercepts_factor,
    opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor,
    opp_spoils_factor,
    opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor,
    opp_contestDefLosses_factor,
    opp_interceptMarks_factor
  )

# ── Join back to player stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
player_stats_goals <- player_stats_goals %>%
  left_join(opponent_defensive_profile,
            by = c("year", "round.roundNumber", "opponent"))

```


```{r}
##Final Data Output


player_stats_goals_concluded <- player_stats_goals %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED") %>% 
  dplyr::select(player.playerId,player.givenName, player.surname, 
         player.player.position, year, round.roundNumber, opponent, venue, goals,
         goal_lag, goalAccuracy_lag, tog_lag, inside50s_lag, f50GroundBallGets_lag,  marksInside50_lag, marksOnLead_lag,
         ewma_goal_lag,
    ewma_inside50s_lag,
    ewma_GA_lag,
    ewma_SAG_lag,
    ewma_TOG_lag,
    ewma_MOL_lag,
    ewma_f50GBG_lag,
    ewma_marksInside50_lag,
    avg_goal_last5,
    var_goal_last5,
    avg_inside50s_last5,
    avg_SAG_last5,
    avg_TOG_last5,
    avg_MOL_last5,
    avg_f50GBG_last5,
    avg_marksInside50_5,
    avg_goal_last3,
    var_goal_last3,
    opp_goals_factor,
    opp_inside50s_factor,
    opp_shotsAtGoal_factor,
    opp_marksOnLead_factor,
    opp_f50GBG_factor,
    opp_marksInside50_factor,
    opp_points_per_i50_factor,
    opp_intercepts_factor,
    opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor,
    opp_spoils_factor,
    opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor,
    opp_contestDefLosses_factor,
    opp_interceptMarks_factor) %>%
  drop_na()

```




```{r}
##Model Development

library(MASS)

# ── Sort by time ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
player_stats_goals_concluded <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber)

# ── Train/test split ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
train <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>% slice_head(prop = 0.9)
test  <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>% slice_tail(prop = 0.1)

# ── Save known levels from train ──────────────────────────────────────────────
known_opponents <- levels(as.factor(train$opponent))
known_venues    <- levels(as.factor(train$venue))
known_positions <- levels(as.factor(train$player.player.position))

# ── Apply to train ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
train <- train %>%
  mutate(
    venue    = ifelse(venue %in% c("Adelaide Arena at Jiangwan Stadium"), "Unknown", venue),
    opponent               = factor(opponent,               levels = c(known_opponents, "Unknown")),
    venue                  = factor(venue,                  levels = c(known_venues,    "Unknown")),
    player.player.position = factor(player.player.position, levels = c(known_positions, "Unknown"))
  )

# ── Add dummy row so glm.nb registers Unknown in xlevels ─────────────────────
dummy_row <- train[1, ] %>%
  mutate(
    opponent               = factor("Unknown", levels = c(known_opponents, "Unknown")),
    venue                  = factor("Unknown", levels = c(known_venues,    "Unknown")),
    player.player.position = factor("Unknown", levels = c(known_positions, "Unknown"))
  )

train_with_dummy <- bind_rows(train, dummy_row)

# ── Fit model ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_goals_nb <- glm.nb(
  goals ~ player.player.position + opponent + venue +
    goal_lag + goalAccuracy_lag + tog_lag + inside50s_lag +
    f50GroundBallGets_lag + marksInside50_lag + marksOnLead_lag +
    ewma_goal_lag + ewma_inside50s_lag + ewma_GA_lag +
    ewma_SAG_lag + ewma_TOG_lag + ewma_MOL_lag +
    ewma_f50GBG_lag + ewma_marksInside50_lag +
    avg_goal_last5 + var_goal_last5 + avg_inside50s_last5 +
    avg_SAG_last5 + avg_TOG_last5 + avg_MOL_last5 +
    avg_f50GBG_last5 + avg_marksInside50_5 +
    avg_goal_last3 + var_goal_last3 +
    opp_goals_factor + opp_inside50s_factor + opp_shotsAtGoal_factor +
    opp_marksOnLead_factor + opp_f50GBG_factor + opp_marksInside50_factor +
    opp_points_per_i50_factor + opp_intercepts_factor +
    opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor + opp_spoils_factor +
    opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor + opp_contestDefLosses_factor +
    opp_interceptMarks_factor,
  data = train_with_dummy
)

# ── Coerce unseen levels in test to Unknown ───────────────────────────────────
test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    opponent = ifelse(opponent %in% known_opponents, opponent, "Unknown"),
    venue    = ifelse(venue    %in% known_venues,    venue,    "Unknown"),
    player.player.position = ifelse(
      player.player.position %in% known_positions,
      player.player.position, "Unknown"
    ),
    opponent               = factor(opponent,               levels = c(known_opponents, "Unknown")),
    venue                  = factor(venue,                  levels = c(known_venues,    "Unknown")),
    player.player.position = factor(player.player.position, levels = c(known_positions, "Unknown"))
  )

# ── Predict on test ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lambda_test <- predict(model_goals_nb, newdata = test, type = "response")



library(xgboost)
library(dplyr)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. FEATURE ENGINEERING
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
player_stats_goals_concluded <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>%
  mutate(
    position_encoded = as.numeric(as.factor(player.player.position)),
    venue_encoded    = as.numeric(as.factor(venue)),
    opp_encoded      = as.numeric(as.factor(opponent))
  )

features_encoded <- c(
  "goal_lag", "goalAccuracy_lag", "tog_lag", "inside50s_lag",
  "f50GroundBallGets_lag", "marksInside50_lag", "marksOnLead_lag",
  "ewma_goal_lag", "ewma_inside50s_lag", "ewma_GA_lag",
  "ewma_SAG_lag", "ewma_TOG_lag", "ewma_MOL_lag", "ewma_f50GBG_lag",
  "ewma_marksInside50_lag",
  "avg_goal_last5", "var_goal_last5", "avg_inside50s_last5",
  "avg_SAG_last5", "avg_TOG_last5", "avg_MOL_last5",
  "avg_f50GBG_last5", "avg_marksInside50_5",
  "avg_goal_last3", "var_goal_last3",
  "opp_goals_factor", "opp_inside50s_factor", "opp_shotsAtGoal_factor",
  "opp_marksOnLead_factor", "opp_f50GBG_factor", "opp_marksInside50_factor",
  "opp_points_per_i50_factor", "opp_intercepts_factor",
  "opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor", "opp_spoils_factor",
  "opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor", "opp_contestDefLosses_factor",
  "opp_interceptMarks_factor",
  "position_encoded", "venue_encoded", "opp_encoded"
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. TRAIN / TEST SPLIT
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
player_stats_goals_concluded <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber)

train <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>% slice_head(prop = 0.9)
test  <- player_stats_goals_concluded %>% slice_tail(prop = 0.1)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. BASE MODEL (MEAN)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
train_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(train[, features_encoded]),
  label = train$goals
)

test_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(test[, features_encoded]),
  label = test$goals
)

params <- list(
  objective        = "count:poisson",
  eta              = 0.05,
  max_depth        = 5,
  subsample        = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.8,
  min_child_weight = 10
)

model_xgb_goals <- xgb.train(
  params                = params,
  data                  = train_matrix,
  nrounds               = 1000,
  watchlist             = list(train = train_matrix, test = test_matrix),
  early_stopping_rounds = 30,
  verbose               = 1
)

lambda_train <- predict(model_xgb_goals, train_matrix)
lambda_test  <- predict(model_xgb_goals, test_matrix)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. FIT NB THETA ON TEST RESIDUALS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(MASS)

theta_xgb_goals <- tryCatch(
  fitdistr(
    test$goals,
    "negative binomial",
    start = list(mu = mean(lambda_test), size = 5)
  )$estimate["size"],
  error = function(e) {
    cat("NB theta fit failed, falling back to Poisson\n")
    NULL
  }
)

cat("XGBoost Goals Theta (NB): ", round(theta_xgb_goals, 4), "\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. CALIBRATION — Poisson and NB
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Use goal-appropriate lines
lines_eval <- c(1, 2, 3, 4)

calibration_pois <- lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
  tibble(
    model         = "XGBoost + Poisson",
    line          = l,
    avg_pred_prob = mean(ppois(l - 1, lambda = lambda_test,
                               lower.tail = FALSE), na.rm = TRUE),
    actual_rate   = mean(test$goals >= l, na.rm = TRUE),
    n             = nrow(test)
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

calibration_nb <- lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
  tibble(
    model         = "XGBoost + NB",
    line          = l,
    avg_pred_prob = mean(pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_xgb_goals,
                                 mu = lambda_test, lower.tail = FALSE), na.rm = TRUE),
    actual_rate   = mean(test$goals >= l, na.rm = TRUE),
    n             = nrow(test)
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

calibration_all <- bind_rows(calibration_pois, calibration_nb) %>%
  arrange(line, model)

cat("\n=== Calibration Comparison ===\n")
print(calibration_all)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. CALIBRATION AWARE THETA TUNING (NB)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Find theta that minimises calibration error at goal lines

best_theta    <- theta_xgb_goals
best_cal_error <- Inf

for (theta_candidate in seq(1, 20, by = 0.5)) {
  cal_error <- mean(sapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
    pred_prob   <- mean(pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_candidate,
                                mu = lambda_test, lower.tail = FALSE))
    actual_rate <- mean(test$goals >= l)
    (pred_prob - actual_rate)^2
  }))

  if (cal_error < best_cal_error) {
    best_cal_error <- cal_error
    best_theta     <- theta_candidate
  }
}

cat("Best Theta: ", best_theta, "\n")
cat("Best calibration error: ", round(best_cal_error, 6), "\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 7. FINAL OUTPUTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    lambda_xgb    = lambda_test,
    theta_goals   = best_theta,
    residuals_xgb = goals - lambda_xgb
  )

cat("Lambda (mean): ", round(mean(lambda_test), 4), "\n")
cat("Theta (tuned): ", round(best_theta,        4), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(shapviz)
library(patchwork)
library(MASS)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. PREP
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
theta_nb       <- model_goals_nb$theta
lambda_nb      <- predict(model_goals_nb, newdata = test, type = "response")
lambda_xgb     <- lambda_test

# Fit NB theta for XGBoost
theta_xgb_nb <- fitdistr(
  test$goals,
  "negative binomial",
  start = list(mu = mean(lambda_xgb), size = 5)
)$estimate["size"]

test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    lambda_nb     = lambda_nb,
    lambda_xgb    = lambda_xgb,
    residuals_nb  = goals - lambda_nb,
    residuals_xgb = goals - lambda_xgb
  )

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. POINT METRICS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
eval_point <- function(res) {
  c(MAE  = mean(abs(res), na.rm = TRUE),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(res^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    MBE  = mean(res, na.rm = TRUE))
}

point_metrics <- bind_rows(
  as.data.frame(t(eval_point(test$residuals_nb)))  %>% mutate(model = "glm.nb"),
  as.data.frame(t(eval_point(test$residuals_xgb))) %>% mutate(model = "XGB")
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. CALIBRATION — goal appropriate lines, Poisson and NB only
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lines_eval <- c(1, 2, 3, 4)

calibrate_nb <- function(lambdas, theta, label) {
  bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
    tibble(
      model         = label,
      line          = l,
      avg_pred_prob = mean(pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta,
                                   mu = lambdas, lower.tail = FALSE)),
      actual_rate   = mean(test$goals >= l),
      n             = nrow(test)
    )
  }))
}

calibrate_pois <- function(lambdas, label) {
  bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
    tibble(
      model         = label,
      line          = l,
      avg_pred_prob = mean(ppois(l - 1, lambda = lambdas,
                                 lower.tail = FALSE)),
      actual_rate   = mean(test$goals >= l),
      n             = nrow(test)
    )
  }))
}

calibration_all <- bind_rows(
  calibrate_nb(test$lambda_nb,  theta_nb,      "glm.nb + NB"),
  calibrate_nb(test$lambda_xgb, theta_xgb_nb,  "XGB + NB"),
  calibrate_pois(test$lambda_nb,               "glm.nb + Poisson"),
  calibrate_pois(test$lambda_xgb,              "XGB + Poisson")
) %>%
  arrange(line, model)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. RPS — Poisson and NB only
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
calc_rps_nb <- function(lambdas, theta, actuals, max_k = 20) {
  mapply(function(lam, act) {
    k        <- 0:max_k
    pred_cdf <- pnbinom(k, size = theta, mu = lam)
    act_cdf  <- as.numeric(k >= act)
    mean((pred_cdf - act_cdf)^2)
  }, lambdas, actuals)
}

calc_rps_pois <- function(lambdas, actuals, max_k = 20) {
  mapply(function(lam, act) {
    k        <- 0:max_k
    pred_cdf <- ppois(k, lambda = lam)
    act_cdf  <- as.numeric(k >= act)
    mean((pred_cdf - act_cdf)^2)
  }, lambdas, actuals)
}

rps_nb_glm    <- calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_nb,   theta_nb,     test$goals)
rps_nb_xgb    <- calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_xgb,  theta_xgb_nb, test$goals)
rps_pois_glm  <- calc_rps_pois(test$lambda_nb,               test$goals)
rps_pois_xgb  <- calc_rps_pois(test$lambda_xgb,              test$goals)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. LOG-LOSS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
calc_log_loss <- function(prob, actual) {
  eps  <- 1e-6
  prob <- pmin(pmax(prob, eps), 1 - eps)
  mean(-(actual * log(prob) + (1 - actual) * log(1 - prob)))
}

logloss_results <- bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
  actual          <- as.numeric(test$goals >= l)
  prob_nb_glm     <- pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_nb,      mu = test$lambda_nb,  lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_nb_xgb     <- pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_xgb_nb,  mu = test$lambda_xgb, lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_pois_glm   <- ppois(l - 1,   lambda = test$lambda_nb,  lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_pois_xgb   <- ppois(l - 1,   lambda = test$lambda_xgb, lower.tail = FALSE)

  tibble(
    line     = l,
    model    = c("glm.nb + NB", "XGB + NB", "glm.nb + Poisson", "XGB + Poisson"),
    log_loss = c(
      calc_log_loss(prob_nb_glm,   actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_nb_xgb,   actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_pois_glm, actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_pois_xgb, actual)
    )
  )
}))

logloss_summary <- logloss_results %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(log_loss = mean(log_loss)) %>%
  arrange(log_loss)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. SUMMARY TABLE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
summary_table <- tibble(
  Model = c("glm.nb + NB", "XGB + NB", "glm.nb + Poisson", "XGB + Poisson"),
  MAE   = c(mean(abs(test$residuals_nb)), mean(abs(test$residuals_xgb)),
            mean(abs(test$residuals_nb)), mean(abs(test$residuals_xgb))),
  RMSE  = c(sqrt(mean(test$residuals_nb^2)), sqrt(mean(test$residuals_xgb^2)),
            sqrt(mean(test$residuals_nb^2)), sqrt(mean(test$residuals_xgb^2))),
  MBE   = c(mean(test$residuals_nb), mean(test$residuals_xgb),
            mean(test$residuals_nb), mean(test$residuals_xgb)),
  RPS   = c(mean(rps_nb_glm), mean(rps_nb_xgb),
            mean(rps_pois_glm), mean(rps_pois_xgb)),
  LogLoss = logloss_summary$log_loss
) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 4))

cat("\n=== MODEL COMPARISON ===\n")
print(summary_table)
cat("\n=== CALIBRATION ===\n")
print(calibration_all)
cat("\n=== PARAMETERS ===\n")
cat("Theta (glm.nb):  ", round(theta_nb,       4), "\n")
cat("Theta (XGB NB):  ", round(theta_xgb_nb,   4), "\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 7. PLOTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

plot_data <- tibble(
  actual    = test$goals,
  pred_nb   = test$lambda_nb,
  pred_xgb  = test$lambda_xgb,
  res_nb    = test$residuals_nb,
  res_xgb   = test$residuals_xgb
)

# ── 7a. Actual vs Predicted ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_avp_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_nb, y = actual)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#1D4ED8") +
  labs(title = "Actual vs Predicted — glm.nb",
       x = "Predicted Goals", y = "Actual Goals")

p_avp_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_xgb, y = actual)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#10B981") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#065F46") +
  labs(title = "Actual vs Predicted — XGBoost",
       x = "Predicted Goals", y = "Actual Goals")

print(p_avp_nb + p_avp_xgb)

# ── 7b. Residual Plots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_res_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_nb, y = res_nb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#1D4ED8") +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted — glm.nb",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Pearson Residuals")

p_res_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_xgb, y = res_xgb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#10B981") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#065F46") +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted — XGBoost",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Residuals")

print(p_res_nb + p_res_xgb)

# ── 7c. Q-Q Plots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_qq_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(sample = res_nb)) +
  stat_qq(alpha = 0.3, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  stat_qq_line(colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot — glm.nb Residuals",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles")

p_qq_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(sample = res_xgb)) +
  stat_qq(alpha = 0.3, colour = "#10B981") +
  stat_qq_line(colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot — XGBoost Residuals",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles")

print(p_qq_nb + p_qq_xgb)

# ── 7d. Calibration Plot per Line ─────────────────────────────────────────────
p_cal <- ggplot(calibration_all, aes(x = avg_pred_prob, y = actual_rate, colour = model)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(group = model)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~ line, labeller = label_both) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title  = "Calibration Plot by Goal Line",
       x      = "Mean Predicted Probability",
       y      = "Actual Hit Rate",
       colour = "Model") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_cal)

# ── 7e. Validation Curve (RPS across goal lines) ──────────────────────────────
lines_full <- 1:8   # goal-appropriate range

val_curve <- bind_rows(lapply(lines_full, function(l) {
  bind_rows(
    tibble(model = "glm.nb + NB",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_nb,   theta_nb,     test$goals))),
    tibble(model = "XGB + NB",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_xgb,  theta_xgb_nb, test$goals))),
    tibble(model = "glm.nb + Poisson",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_pois(test$lambda_nb,               test$goals))),
    tibble(model = "XGB + Poisson",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_pois(test$lambda_xgb,              test$goals)))
  )
}))

p_val <- ggplot(val_curve, aes(x = line, y = rps, colour = model)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title  = "Validation Curve — RPS by Goal Line",
       x      = "Goal Line",
       y      = "Mean RPS (lower = better)",
       colour = "Model") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_val)

# ── 7f. SHAP Summary Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shap <- shapviz(model_xgb_goals, X_pred = as.matrix(test[, features_encoded]))

p_shap_bar <- sv_importance(shap, kind = "bar") +
  labs(title = "SHAP Feature Importance — XGBoost Goals")

p_shap_bee <- sv_importance(shap, kind = "beeswarm") +
  labs(title = "SHAP Beeswarm — XGBoost Goals")

print(p_shap_bar)
print(p_shap_bee)
```


```{r}
# ── 1. Prepare new data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pos_levels   <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_goals_concluded$player.player.position))
venue_levels <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_goals_concluded$venue))
opp_levels   <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_goals_concluded$opponent))

new_data <- player_stats_goals %>%
  filter(status != "CONCLUDED") %>%
  dplyr::select(
    player.playerId, player.givenName, player.surname,
    player.player.position, year, round.roundNumber, opponent, venue, goals,
    goal_lag, goalAccuracy_lag, tog_lag, inside50s_lag,
    f50GroundBallGets_lag, marksInside50_lag, marksOnLead_lag,
    ewma_goal_lag, ewma_inside50s_lag, ewma_GA_lag,
    ewma_SAG_lag, ewma_TOG_lag, ewma_MOL_lag, ewma_f50GBG_lag,
    ewma_marksInside50_lag,
    avg_goal_last5, var_goal_last5, avg_inside50s_last5,
    avg_SAG_last5, avg_TOG_last5, avg_MOL_last5,
    avg_f50GBG_last5, avg_marksInside50_5,
    avg_goal_last3, var_goal_last3,
    opp_goals_factor, opp_inside50s_factor, opp_shotsAtGoal_factor,
    opp_marksOnLead_factor, opp_f50GBG_factor, opp_marksInside50_factor,
    opp_points_per_i50_factor, opp_intercepts_factor,
    opp_defHalfPressureActs_factor, opp_spoils_factor,
    opp_contestDefOneOnOnes_factor, opp_contestDefLosses_factor,
    opp_interceptMarks_factor
  )

# ── Apply factor encodings ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    position_encoded = as.numeric(factor(player.player.position, levels = pos_levels)),
    venue_encoded    = as.numeric(factor(venue,                  levels = venue_levels)),
    opp_encoded      = as.numeric(factor(opponent,               levels = opp_levels))
  )

# ── Confidence flag ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    confidence_flag = case_when(
      is.na(ewma_goal_lag)   ~ "no_history",
      is.na(avg_goal_last3)  ~ "insufficient_history",
      is.na(avg_goal_last5)  ~ "insufficient_history",
      TRUE                   ~ "ok"
    )
  )

# ── 2. Create DMatrix ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
new_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = as.matrix(new_data[, features_encoded])
)

# ── 3. Predict lambda (expected goal count) ───────────────────────────────────
lambda_new <- predict(model_xgb_goals, new_matrix)

# ── 4. Generate probabilities using NB distribution ───────────────────────────
lines <- 1:6

prob_table <- lapply(lines, function(l) {
  new_data %>%
    mutate(
      line         = l,
      prob_over_nb = pnbinom(l - 1, size = best_theta,
                             mu = lambda_new, lower.tail = FALSE),
      decimal_odds = 1 / prob_over_nb
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, line,
                  prob_over_nb, decimal_odds, confidence_flag)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# ── Point prediction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
point_predictions <- new_data %>%
  mutate(predicted_goals = round(lambda_new, 2)) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, predicted_goals)

# ── Pivot wide ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
prob_table_wide <- prob_table %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                line, decimal_odds, confidence_flag) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = line,
    values_from  = decimal_odds,
    names_prefix = "line_"
  ) %>%
  left_join(point_predictions, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "opponent"))

# ── Get Sportsbet odds ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
event_ids   <- sportsbet_eventid_extractor()
all_markets <- bind_rows(map(event_ids$event_id, sportsbet_Scraper))

# ── Clean Sportsbet odds ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
clean_odds <- extract_afl_props(all_markets) %>%
  mutate(fair_odds = 1 / ((1 / odds) / 1.08))


clean_odds_wide <- clean_odds %>%
  mutate(
    line      = as.numeric(str_extract(market, "\\d+")),
    full_name = selection_name
  ) %>%
  filter(
    stat == "goals" | stat == "goal",
    str_detect(market, "^\\d+\\+\\s*[Gg]oals?$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName = str_extract(full_name, "^\\S+"),
    player.surname   = str_remove(full_name,  "^\\S+\\s+")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, line, odds, fair_odds) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = line,
    values_from = c(odds, fair_odds),
    names_glue  = "{.value}_{line}"
  ) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^odds_",      "sportsbet_odds_"),      starts_with("odds_")) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^fair_odds_", "sportsbet_fair_odds_"), starts_with("fair_odds_"))

# ── Join and filter insufficient history ─────────────────────────────────────
comparison <- prob_table_wide %>%
  left_join(clean_odds_wide, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname")) %>%
  filter(confidence_flag == "ok")

# ── Derive common lines ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_lines     <- as.numeric(str_extract(colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^line_\\d+")], "\\d+"))
sportsbet_lines <- as.numeric(str_extract(colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^sportsbet_odds_\\d+")], "\\d+"))
common_lines    <- intersect(model_lines, sportsbet_lines)

# ── Calculate EV ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (l in common_lines) {
  model_col     <- paste0("line_", l)
  sportsbet_col <- paste0("sportsbet_odds_", l)
  ev_col        <- paste0("ev_", l)

  comparison <- comparison %>%
    mutate(
      !!ev_col := (1 / .data[[model_col]]) * (.data[[sportsbet_col]] - 1) -
                 (1 - (1 / .data[[model_col]])) * 1
    )
}

# ── Pivot model odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                predicted_goals, starts_with("line_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("line_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "model_odds",
    names_prefix = "line_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot sportsbet odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
sportsbet_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("sportsbet_odds_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("sportsbet_odds_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "sportsbet_odds",
    names_prefix = "sportsbet_odds_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot EV long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ev_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("ev_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("ev_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "ev",
    names_prefix = "ev_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Join all three and filter positive EV ────────────────────────────────────
comparison_long <- model_long %>%
  left_join(sportsbet_long, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  left_join(ev_long,        by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ev), !is.na(sportsbet_odds), ev > 0) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent,
                predicted_goals, line, model_odds, sportsbet_odds, ev) %>%
  arrange(desc(ev))

print(comparison_long, n = Inf)
```
